cases.description: Audit-report processing request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: I have an audit report with 12 findings. Work through them one by one and fix each
expectations: Creates one TaskCreate entry per finding (12 tasks total)
Presents the full list to the user before starting and waits for confirmation
Processes items one at a time, gathering evidence before proposing a fix
Produces one commit per item in the format `fix(<scope>): <what was fixed>`

cases.description: Lint backlog processing triggers the skill
cases.prompt: eslint is reporting 38 issues across the repo. process the backlog
expectations: Creates one task per lint issue
Invokes codi-evidence-gathering in Phase 2a for each item
Waits for explicit user approval per fix — does NOT auto-implement

cases.description: Deprecated API migration triggers the skill
cases.prompt: we're migrating all usages of the deprecated useAuth() hook — go through each callsite
expectations: Builds the TODO list of callsites as Phase 1
Detects and surfaces the shared root cause if 3+ consecutive items follow the same pattern (pattern-detection escalation)

cases.description: Single bug does NOT trigger audit-fix
cases.prompt: the login button crashes on Safari. fix it
expectations: Routes to codi-debugging or a direct fix flow instead
Does NOT build a TODO list of one item

cases.description: New feature work does NOT trigger audit-fix
cases.prompt: add a dark mode toggle to the settings page
expectations: Routes to codi-plan-writer or codi-subagent-dev / codi-plan-executor instead
Does NOT enforce the one-item-at-a-time iron law
